original text:
Welcome to The Mental Breakdown and Psychreg Podcast!
Today, Dr. Berney and Dr. Marshall discuss the United Nations' mission to encourage tolerance and respect around the world.
Read the article from The United Nations here.
You can now follow Dr. Marshall on twitter, as well!
Dr. Marshall are happy to announce the release of their new parenting e-book, Handbook for Raising an Emotionally Healthy Child Part 2: Attention.
You can get your copy from Amazon here.
We hope that you will join us each morning so that we can help you make your day the best it can be!
See you tomorrow.
Become a patron and support our work at .
Visit Psychreg for blog posts covering a variety of topics within the fields of mental health and psychology.
The Parenting Your ADHD Child course is now on YouTube!
Check it out at the Paedeia YouTube Channel.
The Handbook for Raising an Emotionally Health Child Part 1: Behavior Management is now available on kindle!
Get your copy today!
The Elimination Diet Manual is now available on kindle and nook!

Follow us on Twitter and Facebook and subscribe to our YouTube Channels, Paedeia and The Mental Breakdown.Paragraph Please leave us a review on iTunes so that others might find our podcast and join in on the conversation!

original text:
Coreth Wood, is a large forest in northwestern Iobaria.
Despite being inhabited by bands of hobgoblins, ogres, and frost firs, local human artisans use Coreth's valuable woods, which they carve into valuable works of art and export to Brevoy.
This page was last modified on 4 March 2014, at 11:09.

This page last modified March 2014, 11:09.

original text:
POTTSTOWN PA - An exploration of the historic value associated with wampum and wampum belts, part of an educational symposium on Native American heritage but postponed since January due to inclement weather, has been re-scheduled for Sunday (Feb. 10, 2019) from 1-3 p.m. at ArtFusion 19464, 341 Beech St.
The discussion, led by artist, entertainer and story-teller Barry Lee, is open to the public.
Wampum and wampum belts were important as historical and ceremonial records.
They held significant value among the Native American communities encountered by European explorers and colonists.
Narrator Lee and his wife Barbara Christy are the primary entertainers of the five-time nominated Native American Music Award band, "Spirit Wing."
Experts say Spirit Wing is among one of the most popular Native American acts in the Middle Atlantic states, and is recognized for its dedicated representation of Native American culture.
Lee and Christy have performed during recent years at Pottstown elementary school assemblies and the annual "PowWow on Manatawny Creek" event held in Pottstown on the first weekend of May.
Admission to the talk is free, but a $5 donation is suggested.
Proceeds will benefit the annual celebration of Native American culture, and maintenance of the Native American burial site in Pottstown.
For more information, call Ron Williams at 610-327-1838 or send him an e-mail to naheritagecircle@comcast.net.

original text:
As your FormulaOne High Performance Auto Tint® and LLumar® Car Paint Protection Film dealer in the greater Chicago region, Umbra Window Tinting offers top-of-the-line automotive window tint and clear bra solutions for car enthusiasts, from Elgin and Naperville to Joliet and Orland Park.Whether you're looking to enhance your vehicle's appearance with fashionable shades and styles, lower its interior temperatures for better comfort and fuel efficiency, or defend its exterior against scratches, nicks and minor dents, we're here to help you turn the car you drive into the car you love.
Since 2002 our highly experienced professionals have provided the best aftermarket enhancements for thousands of satisfied customers' vehicles - and they look forward to doing the same for you!
Manufacturer warranties and our own satisfaction guarantee!
Trust your next auto tint or paint protection job to Umbra Window Tinting, and you'll see our difference is in the details!
Contact us today for more information on our products and services and to receive your free quote.
FormulaOne Car Window Tinting Helps You Stay Cool & Feel Even Cooler on Illinois Roads.
In just minutes, the hot Chicago summer sun can send the interior temperature of your car skyrocketing to up to 150°F - making your drive not only uncomfortable, but possibly dangerous.
With FormulaOne automotive window film from Umbra Window Tinting in Chicago, you can reduce the temperatures inside your car by up to 65% before you even turn the air conditioner on!
Say goodbye to blistering leather seats and a blazing steering wheel.
FormulaOne car window tinting takes the strain off your air conditioning system, helping you to save on fuel and subsequently costs at the pump.
Option 1 - Both front and rear windows can be tinted up to 35%.
Option 2 - For darker back windows, you can go up to 30-35% net darkness.
However, then the front windows may only have up to 50% tinting.
To find a window film that offers both the privacy and tinting you want, while remaining within state law, contact Chicago's favorite automotive window tinting company now.
Manufactured and engineered with the utmost precision by the world's leader in applied films, FormulaOne car window film delivers strength and durability unmatched by competitors.
It utilizes top-notch materials and high-performance adhesive to keep your vehicle looking as new as the day it rolled off the lot.
At Umbra Window Tinting, we offer a wide range of FormulaOne window films, all designed to provide outstanding protection and stylish good looks.
ClassicTM Series - Experience the latest in dyed film technology at an affordable price.
The FormulaOne Classic Series is available in a variety of shades, giving your car a soft charcoal appearance and protecting it with the best color longevity of any non-metal film on the market.
Pinnacle® Series - Just because you want the protection of automotive film doesn't mean your phone conversations, radio frequency or GPS should be compromised!
Made from proprietary non-metalized, nonconductive nano-ceramic technology, Pinnacle Series tint not only keeps your ride cool, it also won't interfere with your advanced electronic systems.
If you're happy with the look of your car windows but demand a higher level of performance, then LLumar clear window tints are for you.
They upgrade the glass in your vehicle, increasing UV protection, comfort and more without any window-darkening tint.
This makes them compatible with factory glass of all shades, from clear to deep charcoal.
Whether you're interested in pure and simple 99% UV protection or a full-featured ceramic film that delivers UV blocking power plus serious comfort enhancements, we've got you covered.
And you'll appreciate what comes standard with all our clear window films: barely detectable appearance, powerful protection against harmful UV rays, and impressive durability, thanks to our best-in-class scratch protection.
SpecialtyTM Series - Guard everything inside your car with the ultimate in protection - our Specialty Series.
This automotive film provides the highest UV protection in the industry, ensuring both the exterior and interior of your vehicle look newer, longer.
FormulaOne Stratos Auto Tint (with proprietary Hybrid-MatrixTM technology) - Whether you're commuting to work or taking a weekend trip, stay cool, connected and comfortable with the most advanced non-metal technology - offering maximum heat and glare reduction with no signal interference.
LLumar® AIR Clear Window Tint Series - It's not just your brake pads and air bags that keep you safe!
Apply our micro-thin LLumar AIR Series film to your factory glass windows, and you'll rest assured with protection from shattering, heat and glare, and UV ray damage.
Defends against the sun - As the ozone layer continues to break down, dermatologists are warning against overexposure to the sun.
Sunblock protects your skin, polarized sunglasses protect your eyes, and now window film protects the interior of your car and everyone inside!
By blocking 99% of dangerous UV rays, it's no wonder The Skin Cancer Foundation recommends car window tint.
Reduces damage to your car's interior - UV rays can cause your vinyl, upholstery and leather to crack, peel, fade, and discolor.
Installing automotive window tint prevents such damage, so your car retains its new look, and its value.
Blocks dangerous glare - Glare from the sun, headlights or street lights is not only annoying - it can also be deadly if it affects your view while driving.
FormulaOne car window tint blocks 67% of glare so you can concentrate of the road, wherever it leads.
Guards your car and family - Because our automotive window film is so strong, it can hold broken glass in place in the event of an accident, protecting you and your passengers against flying shards of glass.
In addition, it's incredibly difficult to break through, acting as a deterrent against break-ins and vandals.
Looks great for years to come - All window tinting applied by our certified technicians is custom cut and fit to your car perfectly.
More importantly, you can drive with total ease since it's backed by a LLumar lifetime limited manufacturer's warranty* as well as our own satisfaction guarantee!
See how your car will look with tint!
The window film visualizer displays the year, make and model you choose, lets you select paint color, then applies tint shades from light to dark.
Our tinting options don't just stop at window tinting.
We also offer a variety of custom taillight, headlight and fog light films, which protect your lights from damage and allow you and your vehicle to turn heads everywhere you drive!
Accessorize your ride with resilient, chic FormulaOne automotive window film or one-of-a-kind taillight tint from Umbra Window Tinting in Chicago - and start enjoying more comfort, protection and freedom on the road.
Contact us today for your free, no-obligation estimate.
Whether you're driving around Chicago or parked in your driveway, your vehicle's paint job is in danger everywhere.
Small hazard - such as rocks, salt, hail, sand, and insects - can cause big damage to the exterior of your car and impacts its resale value.
But with automotive paint protection film, also known as clear bra, expertly installed by Umbra Window Tinting, you can guard your vehicle against abrasions, scratches, nicks, and dents so it maintains a fresh, flawless look - regardless of how many miles you travel.
Enhances your car's style - paint protection film has a clear, high-gloss finish that provides industry-leading optical clarity - allowing the true colors of your car to shine through.
Plus, the clear bra self-heals if it's scratched and is resistant to cracks, yellowing and staining.
Custom fits your vehicle - Unlike other protection products, our car paint protection film doesn't require drilled holes or special fasteners; it's computer generated and meticulously cut by our team of professionals to fit your vehicle's exact specifications.
Delivers peace of mind - You can wash, wax and care for your car just as you always have once clear bra is installed.
Additionally, paint protection film is covered by a 10-year manufacturer's warranty and our own satisfaction guarantee.
Discover why customers throughout the Chicago area are raving about paint protection film installation from Umbra Window Tinting.
Get your free, no-obligation quote when you contact us today.
Just because windshield film from Umbra Window Tinting in Chicago provides an invisible layer of protection doesn't mean you won't feel its effects.
Shield your car and everyone inside from the elements with our optically-clear protection film for automotive windshields - the best product in its category, hands down.
When installed by the professionals at Umbra Window Tinting, our film offers an affordable solution that maintains the integrity of your vehicle's windshield as long as it remains on.
Provides scratch & impact resistance - Our hard-coated film is designed to take whatever the road dishes out!
Like glass, it offers scratch-resistant qualities that protect against normal abrasions.
Additionally, should the film experience a serious impact, it only leaves a minimal pinpoint - protecting you and other shotgun riders from dangerous broken shards of glass.
Eliminates most heat, glare & UV rays - Certified installers at Umbra Window Tinting ensure our film is thermally fitted to every curve of your windshield, forming a bond with the glass to defend against the sun.
From the UV stabilizers that reduce the amount of heat entering your car to the polarized finish that reduces glare, you can be sure you receive the defense you deserve!
Offers a sustainable solution to window repair - Windshield film is environmentally friendly, since it prevents unnecessary pollution from windshield glass that, when broken, ends up in streets, sidewalks and landfills.
Protects your investment - With windshield film, you can drive assured knowing it helps maintain the value of your car, while protecting the lives of passengers inside.
Ensure your safety, comfort and protection with quality windshield film from Umbra Window Tinting.
Get your free, no-hassle estimate when you contact us today.
When you need window film or clear bra for your car, turn to the experts at Umbra Window Tinting in Chicago.
We're committed to going above and beyond to ensure you're completely satisfied with our work and have received the results you desire.
Turn your vehicle into the ultimate expression of your individual personality - contact us today to get your no-obligation quote on any of our automotive products or services.
We look forward to serving your window and paint protection film needs!
If you're in the military, a veteran or a senior citizen, remember to ask about our special discounts.

original text:
There is no real easy way to convert your cash into SingularDTV directly, regardless if you are using USD, Euros, GBP, Canadian Dollars, Paypal, Credit Card, etc.. the list goes on.
In order to buy SingularDTV or SNGLS you first need to convert your currency of choice into one of the main crypto currencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or Litecoin, and send it to an exchange where you can easily trade your BTC, ETH, or LTC for SNGLS.
Select your desired coin, enter the amount, and confirm your transaction in the second step.
BTC and ETH are some of the most widely accepted at exchanges for SingularDTV.
Let's get setup and ready to send your new coins to an exchange where SingularDTV is being traded.
Now you are in your fancy new cryptocurrency exchange account and ready to trade your coins purchased from CoinBase into SingularDTV.
Once your order is fulfilled and the trade is complete, you are now the proud owner of some shiny new SingularDTV!
From here you can choose to keep it in the exchange and let it (hopefully!!)
appreciate, trade it for another alt coin, or pretty much do whatever you want with it.

original text:
As winter is fast approaching, the roads and driving conditions can become more of a challenge and potentially dangerous.
Here are just some of our top tips to help keep you safe in the wintery conditions.
Tip 1: Make sure you regularly check your headlights as it is illegal to drive at night without properly functioning front and rear lights.
If a blub does need changing, try avoid driving at night and get it changed as soon as possible.
Tip 2: In heavy rain or snow conditions make sure you reduce your speed and leave more space between you and the vehicle in front as stopping distances are increased.
Tip 3: With the freezing temperatures at night, the gritters are out making sure our roads are safer to drive.
The salt can be a hazard to you as it leaves a white and grey film on windscreens.
To avoid this, make sure your screen wash is topped up frequently and keep some spare windscreen fluid in your car for if you do run out.
Tip 4: Finally, make sure you always have an emergency breakdown kit in your car.
Including just some of the following can help you stay safer in these wintery conditions, an ice-scraper and de-icer, a torch, warm clothes and blankets, empty fuel can, a shovel, first aid kit & jump start cables.
Sometimes you might not be able to prevent breaking down, but you can be prepared.
Follow us on social media to keep up to date with the latest videos and competitions.

original text:
The Patterson Spring site (23CN64) is situated in the James River Drainage near Springfield, Missouri.
Field crews of amateur archaeologists and students from Missouri State University conducted controlled surface surveys and excavation of the site during the 1970s.
The work was directed by Betty Jane Turner and Jeep Helm (members of the Ozarks Chapter of the Missouri Archaeological Society and research associates with the Center for Archaeological Research at MSU).
The site had been used as a pig farm for several years resulting in severe erosion.
The site is located on private property and is not open to visitors.
The first phase of fieldwork at the site was a controlled surface survey where all artifacts were flagged and mapped before being collected.
Pig sheds are seen in the background.
Student archaeologists participating in the James River Archaeological Project (Youthgrant NEH project directed by Michael Fuller at MSU) examine the Patterson Spring site with assistance of pigs!
Archaeologists (right to left) Mike Gilmore, Stan Meyer, Rodney (?
), Roberta Wilson.
Student archaeologists working at an MSU fieldschool at 23CN64; Michael Fuller, standing right, is taking notes and photographs.
Patterson Spring flows through the heart of the site.
Patterson Spring site excavation units.
Soil was excavated in arbitrary layers during the excavation because there were no distinguishing color or texture changes in the soil.
Each arbitrary excavation layer was 6 inches deep.
Aerial photograph of the site taken by Michael Fuller showing excavation units, a Toyota jeep, and the relationship of the spring branch to the nearby river.
Human skull fragments in situ during excavation and view of excavation units.
Nearby was a snapped clay pipe, a pottery sherd, and a groundstone celt.
Two pieces of the snapped clay pipe on the day of discovery in 1975.
Clay pipe found in situ during excavation.
January, 1975.
Woodland Period pipe pieces.
The excavators consider it to be a Middle Woodland Period pipe.
Patsy Corbett cleaning and conserving the pipe fragments.
Rimsherd that was uncovered in situ near the snapped clay pipe.
Drill holes along the edge of the sherd were probably for suspension (using a cord) and not the result of mending.
Three arrowpoints from 23CN64.
The point to the left is from a black chert, probably Pitkin chert, from Arkansas.
The central point is a serrated scallorn point.
The point to the right is a Naylor point manufactured out of a flake without extensive retouch.
These points are either Emergent Mississippian or Late Woodland points.
Archaic point in situ at 23CN64.
Late Woodland projectile points, preforms, and debitage.
One of the most fascinating discoveries at the site was a discrete feature containing hundreds of trimming flakes, waste flakes, blades, and an exhausted core.
It appeared to be the result of a single episode of flintknapping.
Small arrowpoints from the Patternson Spring Site.

original text:
Wyoming Statute 9-2-409: "Each department or agency of the state government shall designate a records officer who shall supervise the departmental records program and who shall represent the office in all departmental matters before the records committee.
The records officer and the director shall prepare transfer schedules for the transfer of public records to the records centers or to the archives.
Wyoming Statute 9-2-410: "All public records are property of the state.
They shall be delivered by outgoing officials and employees to their successors and shall be preserved, stored, transferred, destroyed or disposed of, and otherwise managed, only in accordance with Wyoming Statue 9-2-405 through 9-2-413."
Help control the amount of storage and length of time records are kept.
Provide orderly and systematic destruction of records consistent with administrative, legal, fiscal, and historical requirements.
Ensure protection of valuable records against deterioration or destruction.

original text:
Church of God of Prophecy congregations from around the world will UNITE together on Pentecost Sunday, May 15, 2016 for a Pre-Assembly Simulcast Rally, LIVE from the new Ministry Training Center at the International Offices campus in Cleveland, Tennessee.
The evening, which begins at 7:00 p.m. EST, will feature worship, prayer times, special presentations, and a message from General Overseer Sam N. Clements.
The simulcast will be offered in the English language, with simultaneous services streamed in Spanish and French.
The service is open to the public for those wishing to participate in person.
The Ministry Training Center is located at 3720 Keith Street NW in Cleveland, Tennessee with access to the building being behind the White Wing Bookstore and/or the International Offices building.
Seating is limited and those attending are asked to be present by 6:45 p.m.
The link to the webcast will be available two hours prior to the start of the service at .
Click here to download a bulletin insert/flyer to help promote this event to your local church.
